name: loop-engineering
description: Product OS and GitHub Issue based full-loop engineering workflows for Codex and Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Run Product OS and GitHub Issue engineering loops
interface.longDescription: Use Loop Engineering to initialize Product OS, brainstorm and review feature specs, turn approved specs into work-item plans, triage GitHub Issues, claim ready work, implement and verify changes, open and review pull requests, recover stale runs, and close completed issues with structured run metadata.
defaultPrompt: Initialize Product OS for this repo
Review the current Product OS status
Brainstorm and draft the next Product OS feature spec
Turn the approved feature spec into a work-item plan
Take this GitHub issue through the loop
